name: IGOR_02_Media_Normalizer
description: IGOR_02: media normalizer (audio gpt-4o-transcribe + image gpt-4o-mini vision com prompt PT-BR restritivo + document regex + text passthrough + unknown handoff). Errors -> IGOR_07. Inactive.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.messages (conversation_id, msg_id, text, normalized_text, message_type, direction, role, from_me, media_summary, safety_flags, created_at) SELECT c.id, $1::text, NULL, $2::text, $3::text, 'inbound', 'user', false, $4::text, $5::jsonb, now() FROM public.conversations c WHERE c.chatwoot_conversation_id = NULLIF($6::text, '')::int ON CONFLICT (msg_id) WHERE msg_id IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET normalized_text = EXCLUDED.normalized_text, media_summary = EXCLUDED.media_summary, safety_flags = EXCLUDED.safety_flags;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Merge Branches').first().json; return [m.msgId, m.normalized_text, m.messageType, m.media_summary, m.safety_flags_json, m.chatwoot_conversation_id]; })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('media_normalized', $1::text, NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_02_Media_Normalizer', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Merge Branches').first().json; return [m.phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ test_run_id: m.test_run_id, msgId: m.msgId, messageType: m.messageType, branch: m._branch, safety_flags: m.safety_flags, should_handoff: m.should_handoff, handoff_reason: m.handoff_reason, normalized_text_length: (m.normalized_text || '').length, media_summary_length: (m.media_summary || '').length })]; })() }}
